parameters.query:
SELECT
  em.id           AS entity_id,
  'email_message' AS entity_type,
  em.client_id,
  em.subject,
  em.body_text,
  em.direction,
  em.sent_at
FROM email_messages em
WHERE em.client_id IS NOT NULL
  AND em.direction = 'client_to_team'
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM ai_insights ai
    WHERE ai.entity_id = em.id
      AND ai.entity_type = 'email_message'
  )
ORDER BY em.sent_at DESC
LIMIT 20;

SELECT
  t.id             AS entity_id,
  'transcript'      AS entity_type,
  t.client_id,
  t.file_name       AS subject,
  t.content_text    AS body_text,
  'internal'        AS direction,
  t.transcript_at   AS sent_at
FROM transcripts t
WHERE t.client_id IS NOT NULL
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM ai_insights ai
    WHERE ai.entity_id = t.id
      AND ai.entity_type = 'transcript'
  )
ORDER BY t.transcript_at DESC
LIMIT 10;

SELECT
  t.id AS entity_id,
  'email_thread' AS entity_type,
  t.client_id,
  t.subject,
  t.status AS current_status,
  t.last_direction AS direction,
  t.message_count,
  t.last_message_at AS sent_at,
  (SELECT string_agg(
    em.direction || ': ' || COALESCE(LEFT(em.body_text, 400), em.snippet, ''),
    E'\n---\n' ORDER BY em.sent_at
  ) FROM email_messages em WHERE em.thread_id = t.id) AS body_text
FROM email_threads t
WHERE t.client_id IS NOT NULL
  AND t.status != 'closed'
  AND t.last_message_at < now() - interval '24 hours'
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM ai_insights ai
    WHERE ai.entity_id = t.id
      AND ai.entity_type = 'email_thread'
      AND ai.analyzed_at > t.last_message_at
  )
ORDER BY t.last_message_at DESC
LIMIT 10;

INSERT INTO ai_insights (
  entity_type, entity_id, client_id, model_name,
  summary, sentiment_label, sentiment_score,
  urgency_score, complaint_flag, satisfaction_flag,
  needs_follow_up, topics, risks, raw_output, analyzed_at
)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.entity_type }}'::public.analyzable_entity,
  '{{ $json.entity_id }}',
  '{{ $json.client_id }}',
  'gpt-4',
  '{{ ($json.summary || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.sentiment_label }}'::public.sentiment_label,
  {{ $json.sentiment_score }},
  {{ $json.urgency_score }},
  {{ $json.complaint_flag }},
  {{ $json.satisfaction_flag }},
  {{ $json.needs_follow_up }},
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.topics) }}'::jsonb,
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.risks) }}'::jsonb,
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.raw_output).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb,
  now()
)
ON CONFLICT (entity_type, entity_id)
DO UPDATE SET
  summary         = EXCLUDED.summary,
  sentiment_label = EXCLUDED.sentiment_label,
  sentiment_score = EXCLUDED.sentiment_score,
  urgency_score   = EXCLUDED.urgency_score,
  complaint_flag  = EXCLUDED.complaint_flag,
  satisfaction_flag = EXCLUDED.satisfaction_flag,
  needs_follow_up = EXCLUDED.needs_follow_up,
  topics          = EXCLUDED.topics,
  risks           = EXCLUDED.risks,
  raw_output      = EXCLUDED.raw_output,
  analyzed_at     = now()
RETURNING id AS insight_id;

INSERT INTO action_items (
  client_id, source_entity_type, source_entity_id,
  title, details, status, priority
)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.client_id }}',
  '{{ $('Validate + parse response').item.json.entity_type }}'::public.analyzable_entity,
  '{{ $('Validate + parse response').item.json.entity_id }}',
  '{{ ($json.text || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  'Generado automáticamente por IA',
  'open'::public.action_status,
  '{{ $json.priority }}'::public.action_priority
);
